category_sources: source_facts.description says Rook plugin for Ceph management; official README says it provides management and troubleshooting tools for Rook Ceph as a Krew plugin.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub README heading are kubectl-rook-ceph.
docs_sources: Official Rook docs include a kubectl Plugin troubleshooting page; official README documents install, update, usage, and commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/rook/kubectl-rook-ceph, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Rook and Ceph; official README and docs describe Rook Ceph management, troubleshooting, and Krew plugin usage.
